hero.title: AKRENACE
hero.subtitle: Because Your Child Deserves Elegance That Touches the Heart
hero.description: At AKRENACE, we design clothes that tell a story of a happy childhood. We combine ultimate comfort and modern designs to accompany your children in every adventure, from their first step to their big dreams.

about.title: More Than Just Clothes.. They Are Memories Being Made
about.description: We at AKRENACE realize that every piece of clothing your child wears is part of a beautiful memory. Therefore, we carefully choose the finest natural fabrics that embrace their skin softly, to give them the freedom to play and grow with love.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide for Your Child's Comfort
sizeGuide.measureDesc: To ensure the best comfort for your child, measure them while they are standing in a relaxed position. Use a soft measuring tape and leave a little room for breathing and playing.
